features: ЁЯТКЁЯМЮЁЯТКЁЯМЩ AM AND PM COMPARTMENTS - Separate morning and evening compartments in this monthly dosset box ensure you can organise your medication with ease!
ЁЯТКЁЯМЮЁЯТКЁЯМЩ TRAVEL FRIENDLY - Compact and lightweight, this pill organiser is ideal for travel, ensuring you stay on track with your vitamins or medicine wherever you go!

ЁЯТКЁЯМЮЁЯТКЁЯМЩ EASY TO OPEN - The lids on these compartments couldn't be easier to open. This ensures people with conditions such as arthritis can still access their medication without problems. Plus the numbered text on the boxes is easy to read and ensures you take the right pills on the correct day

ЁЯТКЁЯМЮЁЯТКЁЯМЩ COLOUR CODED DESIGN - Eight bright colour-coded compartments make it easy to distinguish between different days and times, reducing the risk of confusion when taking necessary medicine

ЁЯТКЁЯМЮЁЯТКЁЯМЩ INCLUDED IN THIS PACKAGE - In each package, you will receive a one month pill organiser. There are 32 different pill dispensers (2 compartments per dispenser) in this set in eight different colours. Numbers from 1st - 31st ensuring you have enough for every day of the month and one spare box in case of loss or damage
description: Product description Our one month pill organiser is designed to make your medication management stress-free and efficient. Whether you're organising a complex regimen of vitamins and medicines or just keeping track of a few daily pills, this dosette box offers the ideal solution. The combination of AM and PM compartments with colour-coded days ensures that you stay organized, making it easy to maintain your health routine at home or on the go. Directions Instructions for setting up and using the pill dispenser are included with the product. Safety Warning Safety warnings included with the product See more
